scoringPlays.text: Kewan Lacy 20 Yd Run (Lucas Carneiro Kick)
Trinidad Chambliss 4 Yd Run (Lucas Carneiro Kick)
De'Zhaun Stribling 13 Yd pass from Trinidad Chambliss (Lucas Carneiro Kick)
Logan Diggs 3 Yd Run (Lucas Carneiro Kick)
Trinidad Chambliss 8 Yd Run (Lucas Carneiro Kick)
Justyn Reid 29 Yd pass from Jake Retzlaff (Patrick Durkin Kick)

videos.headline: Tulane Green Wave vs. Ole Miss Rebels: Full Highlights
videos.description: Tulane Green Wave vs. Ole Miss Rebels: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tulane Green Wave vs. Ole Miss Rebels: Full Highlights) 2025/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kewan Lacy breaks free for a TD to get Ole Miss on the board
videos.description: Kewan Lacy takes the handoff 20-yards to the house for an Ole Miss touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kewan Lacy breaks free for a TD to get Ole Miss on the board) 2025/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jake Retzlaff picked off by Jaylon Braxton
videos.description: Jaylon Braxton stalls Tulane's drive by picking off Jake Retzlaff to give the ball back to Ole Miss.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jake Retzlaff picked off by Jaylon Braxton) 2025/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Trinidad Chambliss keeps it himself for a 14-0 Ole Miss lead
videos.description: Ole Miss gets its second touchdown of the first quarter on a 4-yard Trinidad Chambliss run.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Trinidad Chambliss keeps it himself for a 14-0 Ole Miss lead) 2025/12/20 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Patrick Durkin makes 39-yard field goal) 2025/12/20 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Lucas Carneiro kicks 42-yard field goal) 2025/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: De'Zhaun Stribling hauls in 13-yard TD pass from Trinidad Chambliss
videos.description: Trinidad Chambliss finds De'Zhaun Stribling with the quick pass for an Ole Miss touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (De'Zhaun Stribling hauls in 13-yard TD pass from Trinidad Chambliss) 2025/12/20 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Lucas Carneiro makes 48-yard field goal) 2025/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Logan Diggs scores for Ole Miss to open the 4th quarter
videos.description: Logan Diggs takes the direct snap straight into the end zone to extend the Ole Miss lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Logan Diggs scores for Ole Miss to open the 4th quarter) 2025/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Trinidad Chambliss scores his 2nd rushing TD of the game
videos.description: Trinidad Chambliss dives for the end zone and breaks the plane for his second rushing touchdown of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Trinidad Chambliss scores his 2nd rushing TD of the game) 2025/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jake Retzlaff finds Justyn Reid for 29-yard TD
videos.description: Justyn Reid gets Tulane their first touchdown of the game on a 29-yard pass from Jake Retzlaff.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jake Retzlaff finds Justyn Reid for 29-yard TD) 2025/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ole Miss' Pete Golding describes what impressed him in win vs. Tulane
videos.description: Golding expresses pride in the Rebels' dominant performance against the Green Wave and discusses how they plan to prepare for the next round of the CFP.

videos.headline: Chambliss soaks in CFP win, discusses Ole Miss' love for Golding
videos.description: Following the No. 6 Rebels' rout of Tulane in the CFP, QB Trinidad Chambliss shares his excitement and explains the trust and belief the Rebels have in Pete Golding.

videos.headline: Chambliss, Dottery reflect on Ole Miss' CFP first round win vs. Tulane
videos.description: Trinidad Chambliss and TJ Dottery describe the strengths of the No. 6 Rebels' performance and discuss how factors like physicality and focus helped them overcome the Green Wave.
